generated_sql: SELECT T3.artist_name, T4.des FROM song AS T1 INNER JOIN artist AS T2 ON T1.artist_name = T2.artist_name INNER JOIN files AS T3 ON T1.f_id = T3.f_id INNER JOIN genre AS T4 ON T1.genre_is = T4.g_name WHERE T1.song_name LIKE '%love%' ORDER BY T4.des

golden_sql: SELECT T1.artist_name ,  T1.country FROM artist AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.artist_name  =  T2.artist_name WHERE T2.song_name LIKE "%love%
generated_sql: SELECT T3.song_name, T4.artist_name FROM song AS T1 INNER JOIN files AS T2 ON T1.f_id = T2.f_id INNER JOIN artist AS T3 ON T2.artist_name = T3.artist_name INNER JOIN genre AS T4 ON T1.genre_is = T4.g_name WHERE T1.song_name = 'Love'
